name: reorder_game_object
description: Changes the position of a GameObject within its parent's children list (controls order in the Hierarchy panel). Use direction for relative moves or sibling_index for an absolute position.

game_object.description: Name of the GameObject to reorder.

direction.description: Move relative to current position. 'up' moves earlier in the list, 'down' moves later.

sibling_index.description: Absolute sibling index to place the object at (0 = first child). Ignored if direction is set.
